top_signals.title: Chips Stocks Sink Into Bear Market as 105% AI Rally Fizzles
top_signals.summary: A closely-watched index of semiconductor stocks is set to fall into a bear market, unwinding a chunk of the blistering memory-led rally that saw the gauge more than double in just three months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Apple, Nvidia vie for title of world's most valuable company
top_signals.summary: Nvidia shares have underperformed in 2026 as Wall Street shifts to companies powering the infrastructure AI buildout.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Galaxy Digital puts its name on Texas Tech football stadium in 15-year partnership
top_signals.summary: The deal's financial terms were not disclosed, but Yahoo Sports reported the agreement is worth more than $70 million.
